title: isonandra lanceolata f. major
intro: Isonandra lanceolata f. major is a variant of the Isonandra lanceolata plant species, also known as the lance-leaf isonandra or snake wood. It is a plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where its roots are valued for their medicinal properties. The roots of Isonandra lanceolata f. major contain bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and phenolic acids, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the roots are prepared as a decoction or tincture and used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, offering potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
